Appearances:
Plaintiff Sun Dwyer is present.
Attorney David Foran for the plaintiff.
Defendant Zachary Provost is present.
Attorney Tracy Harrison appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of MAY-27-2014 is vacated. (501/JPT)
